title: syngramma vittiformis
intro: Syngramma vittiformis, also known as Vittiformis fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Syngramma vittiformis are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried powder or decoction, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically as a paste or poultice.
